linkedin.notes: Requires Alfred to manually send all messages and posts

instagram.notes: Content drafted and saved — Alfred publishes via Meta Business Suite

facebook.notes: Content drafted — Alfred publishes via Meta Business Suite or Facebook Page

tiktok.notes: Client key configured but OAuth flow not yet completed

youtube.notes: Client key configured but OAuth flow not yet completed. Scripts generated, upload manual.

setup_required: Verify sending domain in Resend dashboard
email.notes: Resend integrated. RESEND_API_KEY required. Drafts saved to Supabase — Alfred approves before sending. Domain verification needed per lane sender address.

telegram.purpose: Internal notifications only — Alfred's daily brief and error alerts
telegram.notes: Only internal use. Never use for outreach to prospects.
